The contact owns a 2024 Ford Maverick. The contact stated that while driving approximately 50 MPH and making a left turn,  the steering wheel became difficult to turn a causing the driver to crash into a field fence with barbed wire at a 90-degree angle, where it came to a stop.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Ford Maverick owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 64 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (25% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
